<TRAJECTA_DATA_3e60f545>page_state:
Apple homepage, scrolled to the iPhone hero section; no AirTag pricing/availability content visible.
task_relevant_visible_text:
Apple; Store; Mac; iPad; iPhone; Watch; Vision; AirPods; TV & Home; Entertainment; Accessories; Support; iPhone; Say hello to the latest generation of iPhone.; Learn more; Shop iPhone; iPad air
selected_candidate:
The visible “Learn more” button in the iPhone hero section.
constraint_evidence:
- Latest model of Apple AirTag: not_visible
- Pricing: not_visible
- Availability: not_visible
- Bulk purchase options: not_visible
- On Apple’s website: supported (URL/title and Apple homepage visible)
- Need product/detail page for AirTag: not_visible
action_target:
Click the “Learn more” link/button for the iPhone hero, not AirTag-related.
success_signals:
A click opens an iPhone product/marketing page or navigates away from the homepage.
failure_signals:
Still on homepage after click; navigation goes to iPhone content instead of AirTag; no pricing/availability/bulk info appears.
uncertainty:
The clicked element may be a generic homepage promo link; exact destination is not visible from the screenshot alone.</TRAJECTA_DATA_3e60f545>

evidence.claim: The agent ended on Apple's iPhone page after clicking a homepage 'Learn more' link, not on any AirTag pricing/availability page.

The high-detail inspection explicitly marks AirTag pricing, availability, and bulk purchase options as not visible, and identifies the clicked candidate as an iPhone hero link rather than AirTag-related.
The trajectory's final screenshots remain on https://www.apple.com/iphone/ with iPhone product cards visible, and there is no visible AirTag product page or bulk purchase information before exit.

args.expected_behavior: Navigate to Apple's AirTag product information page, then check and report the latest model's pricing, availability, and any bulk purchase options on Apple's website.
args.actual_behavior: The agent clicked an iPhone 'Learn more' link from the Apple homepage and ended on the iPhone page without obtaining any AirTag pricing, availability, or bulk purchase details.
args.regression_rule: When the task asks for a specific Apple product and its purchase details, verify the destination is the target product page before following a homepage promo link; do not treat a generic 'Learn more' link as satisfying a product-specific search.
